summary: Tested Unavailability API CRUD, Convocation Visibility settings, and Upcoming Events Without Convocation API. Fixed route ordering bug for /events/upcoming-without-convocation endpoint. All 13 backend tests pass. Frontend Calendar page with Unavailability dialog and Convocation dialog with visibility settings verified.

tests: All valid reasons accepted: ferias, lesao, trabalho, pessoal, outro
Visibility field stored and returned correctly
GET /api/events/upcoming-without-convocation - Returns events in next 24h without convocations
Player cannot access (returns empty list due to permission check)
upcoming_events_without_convocation.bug_fixed: Route ordering bug - moved route before /events/{event_id} to prevent path parameter conflict

tests: Unavailability dialog opens with correct fields (Data Início, Data Fim, Motivo, Notas)
Create Event button visible for admin
Event dropdown menu shows all options (Editar, Convocar Jogadores, Ver Estado Convocatória, Adiar, Cancelar, Eliminar)
Convocation dialog shows player list with checkboxes
Convocation dialog has 'Visibilidade da Convocatória' dropdown with options (Todos, Apenas Jogadores, Apenas Delegados)

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering fixed: /events/upcoming-without-convocation now defined BEFORE /events/{event_id} to prevent FastAPI path parameter conflict
ConvocationVisibility enum properly implemented with values: players, delegates, all
Unavailability reasons properly validated: ferias, lesao, trabalho, pessoal, outro
Coach notification on unavailability creation is MOCKED (push notifications may fail silently)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_unavailability_convocation.py - New test file for unavailability and convocation features
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test accounts and team
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unavailability and Convocation Visibility features fully tested. Backend route ordering bug was fixed. All CRUD operations for unavailabilities work correctly. Convocation visibility settings (players/delegates/all) are properly stored and returned. Frontend UnavailabilityDialog and Convocation dialog with visibility dropdown are working. Push notifications for coach reminders are MOCKED.

bug_fixed.root_cause: Route was defined AFTER /events/{event_id}, causing FastAPI to match 'upcoming-without-convocation' as event_id parameter
bug_fixed.fix: Moved route definition before /events/{event_id} in server.py
